ad_hoc_verifications.context: pipeline-manager morning scan reported 2 stuck jobs with orphan PIDs alive ~8h+. Manual launchd-debugger invocation to verify + clean up.

targets_inspected.pipeline_manager_claim: 3 failed attempts with 'Unexpected' error, orphan wrapper PID 49894 alive ~8h+
targets_inspected.actual_state: Job SUCCEEDED on attempt 3 at 2026-05-06T08:05:11. Validator PASSED. Full artifacts present (report 20KB + sidecar JSON 3.1KB). Attempts 1+2 hit 'An unknown error occurred (Unexpected)' — known-incident ai-ops-5wx pattern — but the wrapper retry policy salvaged it on attempt 3.

pid_check.49894: not alive — already terminated by the time of inspection

targets_inspected.suppression_reason: no-failure-detected (job exit 0, validator passed). Known-incident ai-ops-5wx still applies to attempts 1+2 if those had been terminal failures.

targets_inspected.pipeline_manager_claim: 211-byte log with only start banner, wrapper PID 55943 + claude PID 56191 still alive — likely hung mid-execution
targets_inspected.actual_state: Job COMPLETED on attempt 1 at 2026-05-06T06:43:33 with exit 0. Log file is now 1029 bytes (not 211). Validator PASSED. Artifact at brain/context/deal-aggregator-scan-2026-05-06.md is 32114 bytes — full scan output (0 PASSes, 6 NEAR-MISSes, 25 sources, 132 listings).
targets_inspected.cause: FALSE_POSITIVE — pipeline-manager read a stale mid-run snapshot of the log

ad_hoc_verifications.scan_command: python3 scripts/scan_launchd_failures.py + targeted --log-file scans on both files
ad_hoc_verifications.scan_results: [] (zero failures) on both default 24h scan and explicit --log-file targeting
ad_hoc_verifications.verdict: Both flagged jobs are healthy. No orphan processes to kill. No Slack posts needed.
follow_ups_for_kay: Pipeline-manager's stale-snapshot pattern is worth a memory: when it reports orphan PIDs, cross-check ps before triggering remediation. Pipeline scan must have read both logs while they were mid-run, then surfaced them as stuck. Both completed successfully within an hour of the false-alarm read.
ai-ops-5wx is still open. Niche-intelligence Tuesday wrapper retry policy IS saving it for now (attempt 3 succeeded), but root-cause fix is still pending.
